nasb.text: and He saw two boats lying at the edge of the lake; but the fishermen had gotten out of them and were washing their nets.

esv.text: and he saw two boats by the lake, but the fishermen had gone out of them and were washing their nets.

cnv.text: 他看見兩隻船停在湖邊，漁夫離開船洗網去了。

ccb.text: 祂看见湖边停着两条船，渔夫离了船正在洗网，

csbs.text: 他看见湖边停着两条船，渔夫们下了船，正在洗网。
